scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @sync/shared & npm run dev --workspace @sync/web & npm run dev --workspace @sync/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sync/shared && npm run build --workspace @sync/api && npm run build --workspace @sync/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @sync/shared && npm run lint --workspace @sync/api && npm run lint --workspace @sync/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @sync/shared && npm run test --workspace @sync/api && npm run test --workspace @sync/web
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @sync/shared && npm run format --workspace @sync/api && npm run format --workspace @sync/web
